---
title: "CC "
author: "Tiffany Sun (tsun28@amherst.edu)"
format: 
  pdf:
    toc: true
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
editor: source
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.align: center
---

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE

knitr::opts_chunk$set(   
  message = FALSE)   

library(tidyverse)
library(vroom)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(maps)
library(ggrepel)
library(sf)

my_sf <- read_sf("nyc-streets.geojson") |>
  janitor::clean_names()

```

```{r}
#| label: data
data <- vroom("Motor_Vehicle_Collisions_-_Crashes_20260612.csv") |>
    janitor::clean_names() 

missing_coords <- data |>
    select(c(longitude, latitude, on_street_name)) |>
    filter(is.na(longitude) & is.na(latitude), !is.na(on_street_name)) |>
    select(on_street_name)

coords <- data |>
  select(c(longitude, latitude)) |>
  filter(!is.na(longitude), !is.na(latitude), latitude != 0, longitude != 0) |>
  mutate(longitude = ifelse(longitude < -200, yes =longitude + 127.2832727, longitude))
  
```

```{r}
#| label: map

ggplot(my_sf) +
  geom_sf(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  theme_void()

data_sf <- st_as_sf(
  coords,
  coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
  crs = 4326
) |>
  st_make_valid()

 data_sf <- st_transform(data_sf, st_crs(my_sf))

  st_crs(data_sf)
  st_crs(my_sf)

  nearest_index <- st_nearest_feature(data_sf, my_sf)

joined <- cbind(
  data_sf,
  my_sf[nearest_index, ]
) 

joined <- joined |>
  select(geom) |>
  rename(geom = geometry.1) 

  ggplot(joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = joined), color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  theme_void()


```


```{r}
#| label: handling missing data 
lat_longs <- sample_addresses %>% 
  geocode(addr,lat=latitude,long=longitude)

n <- ceiling(nrow(locations) / 10000)

ds <- split(locations, factor(sort(rank(row.names(locations))%%n)))

ds <- lapply(ds, function(d) {
  as.data.frame(d) |>
    mutate(on_street_name = paste0(on_street_name, ", NY")) |>
    geocode(
      address = on_street_name,
      method = "geocodio",
      lat = "latitude",
      long = "longitude"
    )
})

d <- asds[1]

d <- as.data.frame(ds[1]) |> mutate(on_street_name = paste0(on_street_name, ", NY")) |>
    geocode("on_street_name", method = 'geocodio', lat = latitude, long = longitude)

```
